transcript: Now to India, where protesting farmers have clashed with the police after resuming their march towards the capital Delhi. There were scenes of chaos at the Shambhu border between the northern states of Punjab and Haryana, where the farmers were stopped on Tuesday. The farmers are demanding minimum guaranteed prices for a range of crops, as well as debt relief and a withdrawal of cases registered against them during previous disputes. But the Indian government believes these are part of making agriculture more efficient.
